repository.local_path_policy: Use the current checked-out local workspace for oakermann/kohee-list.

routing.task_queue: GitHub issue #23 until a dedicated queue issue or API exists

auto_merge_allowed: LOW docs-only, audit-only, checker docs sync after evidence gates pass
selected MEDIUM scripts/** parser/test/dry-run work after evidence gates pass

merge_evidence_gates: changed files match the task packet
review threads are absent or resolved
policy-risk is LOW or approved MEDIUM

deploy_policy.rule: Deploy, secrets, and Cloudflare production settings remain HOLD unless explicitly approved.

product_invariants: public /data must expose approved, non-deleted cafes only
auth/session/security behavior is HIGH/HOLD by default
CSV import/reset behavior is HIGH/HOLD by default
